ksa_text: Monitor regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisory guidance relevant to organizational data and AI activities, producing impact assessments and management recommendations.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA) principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Regulatory Compliance is an edge domain for the Data and AI Transformation Lead, this task KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.489) and conceptual alignment to include at the senior specialist level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Regulatory Compliance), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.489). External reviewers may question whether this specific task KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Data and AI Transformation Lead versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, and SEC data governance regulations confirm regulatory compliance knowledge for governance-focused leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Regulatory Compliance appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Data and AI Transformation Lead.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance task KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.489. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Data and AI Transformation Lead.
